title: Breaking Bad Totems
description: A recourse pack that changes your totme to breaking bad charachters! We have Walter White, Saul Goodman and Jesse Pinkman!
body:
The Breaking Bad Totems.

The name speaks for itself, The pack(s) have Breaking bad charachters such as Walter White, Jesse Pinkman and Saul goodman as totems. All are high resolution.

-CHECK GALLERY FOR FOTOS OF TOTEMS! (Currently not all are in gallery!)

-It is to be noted that they work with ALL version (to my knowledge!) 

-If you like this then consider checking my other Breaking bad related projects!!

ADDED CHARCHTERS TO DATE
-Walter White

-Jesse Pinkman

-Saul goodman

-Mike Ehrmantraut

-Huell (Goat)

-Skylar White (ew)

-Gustavo Fring

-Flynn/Walt jr

-Tuco Salamanca

-Hector Salamanca

-Nacho Varga

-Hank "ASAC" Schrader
